## Other Imperial Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Astropath (Cost: 2 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Adepta Sororitas Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Astropath | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Astropath is equipped with a Force Rod. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Force Rod.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD

The Astopath knows the following Psychic Powers:

* **Perfect Timing (Effect).** 12”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Target Activation, the target has IGNORE COVER and IGNORE LONG RANGE when making ranged attacks.  
* **Precognition (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, all attacks against that model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Prescience (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate, the target gains a BLESSING MARKER.

**Keywords**  
PSYKER 1

#### 0-1 Canid Companion (Cost: 2 Glory)

Cannot be taken by an Astra Militarum Warband.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Canid Companion | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Canid Companion is equipped with its Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bite.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Canid Swiftness.** The Canid Companion has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Fetch.** The Canid Companion can drag along any Down model within 1” when it moves, moving at half speed with the other model following directly behind it, both with normal movement or when dashing. If this takes that model out of melee combat, this does not trigger a free Fight Action.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Canid Companion forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner (though it may outrank that model if it is not ELITE).

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Lone Inquisitor (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Inquisition Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inquisitor | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Inquisitor is equipped with Power Armour, a Plasma Pistol, a Power Weapon, Filter Plugs, and a Rosarius. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Plasma Pistol.** Scope  
  * Normal Shot: 12”, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.  
* **Rosarius.** The Inquisitor treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

When you recruit the Lone Inquisitor, choose one of the following Ordos:

* **Ordo: Hereticus.** The Lone Inquisitor gains the FEAR Keyword and is equipped with a Hand Flamer instead of its Plasma Pistol.  
  * **Hand Flamer.** 6”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-2 INJURY DICE, FIRE, PISTOL, loses FLAMETHROWER when attacking in melee  
* **Ordo: Malleus.** The Lone Inquisitor gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword and knows the following powers. Replace its Power Weapon with a Force Weapon.  
  * **Force Weapon.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, Additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD  
  * **Foreboding (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, whenever an enemy attempts to Charge the target, the target can make either a ranged attack before that Charge, or a melee attack afterwards, against the Charging model in either case.  
  * **Mental Fortitude (Effect).** No Range, No Targets, End of Turn, you have \+1 DICE to your Morale Test at the end of this Turn, if any.  
  * **Precognition (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, all attacks against that model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
  * **Terrify (Effect).** Melee, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. A model that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.  
* **Ordo: Xenos.** Replace the Lone Inquisitor’s Plasma Pistol with an Avenger Shuriken Catapult and a Scorpion Chainsword  
  * **Avenger Shuriken Catapult.** 18”, AUTOMATIC 2, ASSAULT, ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on Critical Hit, TWO-HANDED  
  * **Scorpion Chainsword.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL  
* **Ordo: Minoris.** The Lone Inquisitor gains the STRONG Keyword and is equipped with a Heavy Bolter and a Heavy Power Weapon instead of its Plasma Pistol and Power Weapon.  
  * **Heavy Bolter.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY  
  * **Heavy Power Weapon.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED

**Keywords**  
ELITE, INQUISITION, NEGATE FEAR, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Rogue Trader Warbands. Can also be taken by Pirate Crew Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Navigator | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Navigator is equipped with a Las Pistol, a Force Rod, and its Third Eye. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”  
* **Force Rod.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD

The Navigator knows the following psychic powers:

* **Foreboding (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, whenever an enemy attempts to Charge the target, the target can make either a ranged attack before that Charge, or a melee attack afterwards, against the Charging model in either case.  
* **Misfortune (Effect).** 12”, Enemy, 1 Target, the target gains D3 STUN MARKERS.  
* **Third Eye (Attack).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY

**Abilities**

* **Calm the Tides (Psychic).** The Navigator and any other model within 8” of it do not suffer the effects of Perils of the Warp.  
* **Gaze Into the Empyrean (Psychic).** Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from this model when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords.

**Keywords**  
PSYKER 1

#### 0-1 Ogryn Bodyguard (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Custodes, or Astra Militarum Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ogryn Bodyguard | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-2 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Orgryn Bodyguard is equipped with Standard Armour, a Shield, a Ripper Gun, and a Two-Handed Hammer. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Ripper Gun.** 12”, \+2 INJURY DICE at Short Range, HEAVY, SHOTGUN, Shield Combo  
* **Two-Handed Hammer.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Orgryn Bodyguard is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Orgryn Bodyguard instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Orgryn Bodyguard.  
* **Wall of Muscle.** All injury rolls made against the Ogryn Bodyguard have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Rejuvenat Adept (Cost: 2 Glory)

An Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, or Adeptus Custodes Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Rejuvenat Adept | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Rejuvenat Adept is equipped with Standard Armour, a Laspistol, and a Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Healing Serum.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Rejuvenat Adept can inject itself or one ally within 1” of it that it can see with a healing serum. On a success, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Normalizer Helm.** Your opponent cannot spend BLOOD MARKERS on this model's Success Rolls, except for Melee Attack, Ranged Attack, and Dash.

**Keywords**  
—

#### 0-1 Sanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by an Adepta Sororitas, Adeptus Astartes, or Adeptus Custodes Warband.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sanctioned Psyker | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sanctioned Psyker is equipped with Standard Armour, a Force Rod, and a Laspistol. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Force Rod.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD  
* **Laspistol.** 12”

When you recruit the Sanctioned Psyker, choose one of the following disciplines. The Sanctioned Psyker knows all of the powers listed below under that discipline.

* **Biomancy**  
  * **Bio Lightning (Attack).** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
  * **Endurance (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model.  
  * **Iron Arm (Effect).** No Range, Self, 1 Target, Next Activation, injury rolls against the caster have \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour up to \-3.  
* **Divination**  
  * **Foreboding (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, whenever an enemy attempts to Charge the target, the target can make either a ranged attack before that Charge, or a melee attack afterwards, against the Charging model in either case.  
  * **Precognition (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, all attacks against that model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
  * **Prescience (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate, the target gains a BLESSING MARKER.  
* **Pyromancy**  
  * **Fire Shield (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate and End of Turn, each enemy in close combat with the target immediately suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER, and each time an enemy enters close combat with the target and after each time an enemy attacks it in melee, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER. An enemy with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.  
  * **Spontaneous Combustion (Effect).** 12”, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target suffers 2 BLOOD MARKERS. A target with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.  
* **Technomancy**  
  * **Blessing of the Machine God (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, Target Activation, the target has \+1 INJURY DICE with one weapon of your choice.  
  * **Machine Flense (Attack).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE non-ARTIFICIAL, non-VEHICLE models, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
  * **Reforge (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, immediate, if the target has the ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE Keyword, or is a model with at least \-2 worth of Armour (besides shields), remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from it.  
* **Telekinesis**  
  * **Assail (Attack).** 12”, ASSAULT, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, PSYCHIC, SHRAPNEL, RISKY  
  * **Shockwave (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Enemy and Ally, Each Target, Immediate, each target must roll on the Injury table, with \+1 INJURY DICE. This injury has IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, and STUN MARKERS. The targets are then each pushed D3” directly away from the caster unless they are LARGE.  
  * **Telekine Dome (Effect).** No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster and each ally within 3” of it have \-1 DICE.  
* **Telepathy**  
  * **Psychic Shriek (Attack).** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
  * **Puppet Master (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.  
  * **Terrify (Effect).** Melee, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. A model that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.

**Keywords**  
PSYKER 1
